2604.23585.title: ComplianceNLP: Knowledge-Graph-Augmented RAG for Multi-Framework Regulatory Gap Detection
2604.23585.paper_summary: Financial institutions must track over 60,000 regulatory events annually, overwhelming manual compliance teams; the industry has paid over USD 300 billion in fines and settlements since the 2008 financial crisis. We present ComplianceNLP, an end-to-end system that automatically monitors regulatory changes, extracts structured obligations, and identifies compliance gaps against institutional policies. The system integrates three components: (1) a knowledge-graph-augmented RAG pipeline grounding generations in a regulatory knowledge graph of 12,847 provisions across SEC, MiFID II, and Basel III; (2) multi-task obligation extraction combining NER, deontic classification, and cross-reference resolution over a shared LEGAL-BERT encoder; and (3) compliance gap analysis that maps obligations to internal policies with severity-aware scoring. On our benchmark, ComplianceNLP achieves 87.7 F1 on gap detection, outperforming GPT-4o+RAG by +3.5 F1, with 94.2% grounding accuracy ($r=0.83$ vs. human judgments) and 83.4 F1 under realistic end-to-end error propagation. Ablations show that knowledge-graph re-ranking contributes the largest marginal gain (+4.6 F1), confirming that structural regulatory knowledge is critical for cross-reference-heavy tasks. Domain-specific knowledge distillation (70B $\to$ 8B) combined with Medusa speculative decoding yields $2.8\times$ inference speedup; regulatory text's low entropy ($H=2.31$ bits vs. $3.87$ general text) produces 91.3% draft-token acceptance rates. In four months of parallel-run deployment processing 9,847 updates at a financial institution, the system achieved 96.0% estimated recall and 90.7% precision, with a $3.1\times$ sustained analyst efficiency gain. We report deployment lessons on trust calibration, GRC integration, and distributional shift monitoring for regulated-domain NLP.
2604.23585.paper_summary_zh: 金融機構每年必須追蹤超過60,000個監管事件，這使得手動合規團隊不堪重負；自2008年金融危機以來，該行業已支付超過3,000億美元的罰款和和解金。<lb/>我們提出了ComplianceNLP，一個端到端的系統，能自動監控監管變更、提取結構化義務，並識別與機構政策之間的合規差距。<lb/>該系統整合了三個組件：(1) 一個知識圖譜增強的RAG管道，將生成內容基於涵蓋12,847條規定的監管知識圖譜，這些規定來自SEC、MiFID II和巴塞爾協議III；(2) 多任務義務提取，結合了NER、義務分類和跨參考解析，使用共享的LEGAL-BERT編碼器；以及(3) 合規差距分析，將義務映射到內部政策並進行嚴重性感知的評分。<lb/>在我們的基準測試中，ComplianceNLP在差距檢測上達到了87.7的F1，超越了GPT-4o+RAG 3.5的F1，並且具有94.2%的基礎準確率（$r=0.83$對比人類判斷）以及在現實端到端錯誤傳播下的83.4 F1。<lb/>消融實驗顯示，知識圖譜重新排序貢獻了最大的邊際增益（+4.6 F1），確認結構性監管知識對於重度跨參考任務至關重要。<lb/>特定領域的知識蒸餾（70B $\to$ 8B）結合Medusa投機解碼實現了$2.8\times$的推理加速；監管文本的低熵（$H=2.31$位對比一般文本的$3.87$）產生了91.3%的草稿標記接受率。<lb/>在四個月的平行運行部署中，處理了9,847次更新，該系統實現了96.0%的預估召回率和90.7%的精確度，並持續提高了$3.1\times$的分析師效率。<lb/>我們報告了在受監管領域的NLP中關於信任校準、GRC整合和分佈變化監控的部署經驗教訓。
2604.23585.author: Dongxin Guo et.al.
2604.23585.authors: Dongxin Guo, Jikun Wu, Siu Ming Yiu
